zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Boothe於1472年出生在英國爾鄧翰 梅西時，她的父親Sir George Booth27歲，母親Catherine de Monfort31歲。她於大約1488年與Richard de Reynes II在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1522年在英國諾廷加姆爾鄧翰享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Boothe于1472年出生在英国爾鄧翰 梅西时，她的父亲Sir George Booth27岁，母亲Catherine de Monfort31岁。她于大约1488年与Richard de Reynes II在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1522年在英国諾廷加姆爾鄧翰享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Boothe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Booth
meanings: English (northern): topographic or occupational name from Middle English bothe (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’. The latter sense was predominant in the Pennines of Lancashire and Yorkshire, where there were many cattle farms or vaccaries, and whose subdivisions were known as ‘booths’. The principal meaning of the surname there was therefore probably ‘cattle herdsman’, ‘man in charge of a vaccary’, and thus identical with Boothman . Elsewhere it may have denoted a shopkeeper who owned a temporary market stall, but no evidence has been found to confirm this use of the surname. In the British Isles the surname is still more common in northern England, where Scandinavian influence was more marked, and in Scotland, where the word was borrowed into Gaelic as both(an).
History: Robert Booth (1604–72) is mentioned in the colonial records of Exeter, NH, in 1645. He subsequently moved to ME.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Boothe was born in 1472, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir George Booth, was 27 and her mother, Catherine de Monfort, was 31. She married Richard de Reynes II about 1488, in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1522, in Dunham, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Boothe est née en 1472, à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir George Booth, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Monfort, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Reynes II environ 1488, à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1522, à Dunham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Bootheが1472年にイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイで生まれた時，父Sir George Boothは27歳，母Catherine de Monfortは31歳であった。約1488年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスでRichard de Reynes IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1522年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアダンハムで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Boothe(이)가 1472년 영국 체실르 던함 마시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Booth(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine de Monfort(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에서 Richard de Reynes II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1522년 영국 노틴그함실르 던함에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Boothe родилась в 1472 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir George Booth было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Monfort, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Reynes II около 1488 г. в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1522 г. в местности дунам, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.
